titleStmt.title: SII 22.105: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 105. (A.R. No. 105 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. VIKRAMA-CHŌḶA—8th YEAR (A.D. 1125-6)

summary.p: This is built in at the beginning of each line. It seems to record a gift of the taxes Śiṟupāḍikāval and Śilvari on lands at Tagaḍi a dēvadāna village on the southern bank of the Peṇṇai for the mantrapōnagam offering to the deity during the early morning service in the temple of Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-Mahādēva at Śeṇbai, by Sagarayaṉ Anupaman Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Malaiyakularāyan the [Malayamān] chief of Kiḷiyūr in Tirumuṉaippāḍi Kuṉṟattūr-nāḍu a division of Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī vikkirama coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu vāṇakoppāṭi rājentravaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇai (vaṭa)vaṭakaraic ceṅku
payāṉa virarājentrapurattut tirukkaṟṟaḷi mahādevaṟku kaṅkai koṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭik kuṉṟattūrnāṭṭuk kiḷi
n Anupamanāna kulottuṅkacoḻa malaikularāyanen Ittevar tevatāṉam peṇṇait tenkarait takaṭiyil nancey nilattil pa
ciṟupāṭikāvaluñ cilvariyum Ittevaṟku ciṟukālaiccanti mantimantraponakam Amutupaṭikkuc ceytu kuṭutten cakarayan Aṉupa
ṅkacoḻa malaiyakularāyanen Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
